ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "onset" REAL /* Time at which the trial started */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the trial */,
  "trial_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial type */,
  "trial_cue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial cue */,
  "trial_switch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial switch condition */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time taken by the participant to respond */,
  "response_button" INTEGER /* Button pressed by the participant */,
  "response_accuracy" INTEGER /* Accuracy of the participant's response (1 for correct, 0 for incorrect) */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session */,
  "trial_sequence_number" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the trial within the session */,
  "trial_note" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the trial */,
  "trial_version" INTEGER /* Version of the trial setup */,
  "trial_status" TEXT /* Status of the trial (e.g., completed, skipped, interrupted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_trial_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_type_id") REFERENCES trial_types ("trial_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_trial_cue_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_cue_id") REFERENCES trial_cues ("trial_cue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_trial_switch_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_switch_id") REFERENCES trial_switches ("trial_switch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the participant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the participant was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the participant's information was last updated */,
  "participant_status" TEXT /* Status of the participant (e.g., active, withdrawn) */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the participant */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any medical conditions that might affect the experiment */,
  "consent_form_signed" INTEGER /* Whether the participant has signed the consent form */,
  "consent_form_date" TEXT /* Date when the consent form was signed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the experiment's information was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "experiment_version" INTEGER /* Version of the experiment */,
  "experiment_details" TEXT /* Detailed notes or protocols of the experiment */,
  "lead_researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_lead_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the session took place */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the session */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., active, completed, canceled) */,
  "session_version" INTEGER /* Version of the session setup */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_types" (
  "trial_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial type */,
  "trial_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial type (e.g., Congruent, Incongruent) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trial type */,
  "trial_type_version" INTEGER /* Version of the trial type */,
  "trial_type_status" TEXT /* Status of the trial type (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_cues" (
  "trial_cue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial cue */,
  "trial_cue_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial cue (e.g., AttendLetter, AttendNumber) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trial cue */,
  "trial_cue_version" INTEGER /* Version of the trial cue */,
  "trial_cue_status" TEXT /* Status of the trial cue (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_cue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_switches" (
  "trial_switch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial switch condition */,
  "trial_switch_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial switch condition (e.g., None, Repeat, Switch) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trial switch condition */,
  "trial_switch_version" INTEGER /* Version of the trial switch condition */,
  "trial_switch_status" TEXT /* Status of the trial switch condition (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_switch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user's information was last updated */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department or affiliation of the user */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position or role within the department */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment or trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment or trial was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device type used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
